acmpca.certificate.customextension.CfnAb:
Specifies the X.509 extension information for a certificate.

Extensions present in `CustomExtensions` follow the `ApiPassthrough` [template rules](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/privateca/latest/userguide/UsingTemplates.html

acmpca.certificate.customextension.Criti.Description: Specifies the critical flag of the X.509 extension.

acmpca.certificate.customextension.Objec.Description: Specifies the object identifier (OID) of the X.509 extension. For more information, see the [Global OID reference database.](https://oidref.com/2.5.29)

acmpca.certificate.customextension.Value.Description: Specifies the base64-encoded value of the X.509 extension.
